description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on push, pull request, and a scheduled cron job. The workflow should ignore changes to docs, .github/workflows/docs.yml, and markdown files. It should use a matrix strategy to build on ubuntu-latest, macos-14, and windows-latest, checking out the code, installing dependencies, modifying environment variables, creating a build directory, configuring CMake, building, and testing with CTest.
